---
title: "Modelling Approaches for Reporting Delays"
---

::: {.callout-note}
Content will be drawn from the companion paper
(Section 3: Opportunities from modelling).
Tables will be interactive and filterable.
:::

For each approach below, we describe what it does, what data it needs, and what it gives you.
For mathematical details and computational properties, see the companion technical overview.

## Approaches by challenge

| Challenge | Approach | Examples | Data requirements |
|---|---|---|---|
| Reporting delays | Discarding recent data | — | Empirical delay distribution |
| Reporting delays | Frozen values | — | Data snapshots |
| Reporting delays | Aggregation by report date | — | Report date counts |
| Reporting delays | [Chain-ladder](chain-ladder.qmd) | baselinenowcast, ChainLadder | Reporting triangle |
| Reporting delays | [GAMs](gams.qmd) | nowcaster, UKHSA GAMs | Reporting triangle |
| Reporting delays | [Bayesian hierarchical](bayesian-hierarchical.qmd) | NobBS | Reporting triangle |
| Reporting delays | Ad-hoc | EpiNow2 | Case counts + delay estimate |
| Reporting delays | [Semi-mechanistic](semi-mechanistic.qmd) | EpiNow2, epinowcast | Reporting triangle |
| Data revisions | Excluding known revision periods | — | Revision history |
| Data revisions | [Chain-ladder](chain-ladder.qmd) | baselinenowcast | Data snapshots |
| Site drop-in/out | Restricting to consistent sites | — | Site participation records |
| Other data quality | De-duplication and imputation | — | Line list or aggregate data |

: Modelling approaches for addressing surveillance data challenges {.striped .hover}

## Software

| Package | Method | Expectation model | Time-varying delays | Count distribution | Day-of-week effects | Proper delay | Parametric delay | Strata pooling | Additional data |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [baselinenowcast](https://github.com/epinowcast/baselinenowcast) | Multiplicative | None | Rolling window | Poisson, NegBin | Separate models | Yes | No | No | No |
| [ChainLadder](https://cran.r-project.org/package=ChainLadder) | Multiplicative | None | Rolling window | Various | No | Yes | No | No | No |
| [NobBS](https://cran.r-project.org/package=NobBS) | Multiplicative | Random walk | Rolling window | NegBin | No | Yes | No | No | No |
| [EpiNow2](https://github.com/epiforecasts/EpiNow2) | Multiplicative | Flexible | Partial | Poisson, NegBin | Yes | Yes | Yes | No | No |
| [nowcaster](https://github.com/covid19br/nowcaster) | Regression | Smooth | Yes | User-specified | Yes | No | No | Yes | Possible |
| [EpiLPS](https://github.com/oswaldogressani/EpiLPS) | Regression | Smooth | Yes | User-specified | Yes | No | No | No | No |
| [surveillance](https://cran.r-project.org/package=surveillance) | Generative (conditional) | Log-linear | Yes | Poisson, NegBin | Yes | Yes | No | No | Yes |
| [epinowcast](https://github.com/epinowcast/epinowcast) | Generative (marginal) | Flexible | Yes | Multiple built-in | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |

: Available software packages for correcting delayed surveillance data. Additional implementations exist in the literature; see the companion technical overview for a full treatment. {.striped .hover}
